name: recoil_app_constructor
description: RecoilApp::Constructor builds the MFC/OLE base, initializes embedded FMV/state objects, installs the RecoilApp vtable, and clears the transition timer.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 164 unmasked mismatches after masking 20 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 194 bytes and the VC object body is 128 bytes.

The byte drift starts at the function entry because the original emits an EH registration frame and cleanup-state writes for constructor subobject rollback that the current object body does not reproduce under the selected profile.
The native smoke constructs a RecoilApp and verifies the returned this pointer, top-level app vtable, embedded state vtables, and cleared transition timer before running the destructor smoke.
